title: Themization System
description: Guide to implementing theme switching (light/dark) using React Context, HOC, and localStorage.
benefit_text: Isolation of theme logic from business components. Automatic saving of user choice and prevention of theme 'flicker' on load.

types.title: Types & Interfaces
types.description: Defining allowed theme values (<0>light</0>, <0>dark</0>) and the context structure for state management.

context.title: React Context
context.description: Creating a data channel for passing theme data down the component tree without prop drilling.

hook.title: Custom Hook
hook.description: Encapsulating context access logic in a convenient <0>useTheme</0> hook with provider presence validation.

provider.title: Theme Provider
provider.description: Implementing a provider component that manages state, interacts with <0>localStorage</0>, and manipulates <0>html</0> classes.

setup.title: Initialization HOC
setup.description: Creating the <0>withTheme</0> Higher-Order Component for easy application wrapping at the provider level.

ui.title: UI Component (Toggle)
ui.description: Creating a toggle button that uses the <0>useTheme</0> hook to switch the visual state.

provider.label: Provider:
provider.text: Located in <0>src/app/providers/theme/</0>. Responsible for global initialization.

shared.label: Shared Logic:
shared.text: Context, hooks, and UI components are placed in <0>shared/</0> as they are reusable.
